title: Pentagon Raises Force Protection Level Across CENTCOM
detail: The Pentagon raises the Force Protection Condition (FPCON) to 'Charlie' across all US installations in the CENTCOM area of responsibility, the highest peacetime level. All non-essential personnel at US embassies in Iraq, Bahrain, and Kuwait are ordered to evacuate. Patriot and THAAD missile defense batteries are confirmed operational at multiple Gulf bases.

title: IRGC Navy Warns of Strait of Hormuz Closure
detail: IRGC Navy Commander Rear Admiral Alireza Tangsiri declares that Iran 'has the capability and will to close the Strait of Hormuz at any moment if threatened.' Iran deploys fast-attack craft and anti-ship missile batteries along the strait's northern shore. The US Fifth Fleet responds by increasing patrol frequency. Approximately 21% of global oil supply transits the 33-km-wide chokepoint daily.

title: China and Russia Jointly Oppose Military Intervention
detail: In a joint statement, China and Russia 'strongly oppose any unilateral military action against Iran,' warning it would 'destabilize the entire Middle East.' Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi calls for 'dialogue and de-escalation.' Russia announces it will expedite delivery of S-400 air defense systems to Iran under existing contracts. The statement signals that any US action would face significant geopolitical pushback.
